quote.text: It’s a long road, but it’s worth it. Every climb makes you stronger.
quote.author: Cadel Evans
quote.attribution: Public Interview / Tour de France Champion

micro_action.task: Take the stairs instead of the elevator/escalator today.

quote.text: Never let a good wave go to waste. In life and in surfing, take your chances.
quote.author: Layne Beachley

micro_action.task: Say 'Yes' to a new challenge today.

quote.text: You just have to keep moving forward. No matter what happens, keep paddling.
quote.author: Mick Fanning

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water after your school day ends.

quote.text: I had to overcome my own doubts and the noise around me to reach my potential.
quote.author: Sally Pearson

micro_action.task: Spend 2 minutes sitting in silence to clear your mind.

quote.text: Turn your disability into your ability. Your perspective is your greatest strength.
quote.author: Dylan Alcott
quote.attribution: Public Interview / Paralympic & Grand Slam Champion

micro_action.task: Help someone with something they find difficult today.

quote.text: Keep pushing. When your arms are tired, push with your heart.
quote.author: Kurt Fearnley

micro_action.task: Do 5 more reps of any exercise today.

quote.text: Represent your family and your community with pride in everything you do.
quote.author: Patty Mills

micro_action.task: Use 'Thank you' to show respect to an official or teacher.

quote.text: The journey is the reward. Enjoy every step, every win, and every lesson.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Eat an orange or apple as your snack today.

quote.text: Stay focused on the ball. If you lose focus, you lose the game.
quote.author: Karrie Webb

micro_action.task: Focus 100% on your homework for 20 minutes without a phone.

quote.text: Softball is a game of failures. You have to be able to handle striking out to hit the home run.
quote.author: Stacey Porter

micro_action.task: If you miss a target today, try again twice more immediately.

quote.text: The price of greatness is responsibility.
quote.author: Winston Churchill

micro_action.task: Clean up your workspace or room today.

quote.text: Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.
quote.author: Will Rogers

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before each meal.

quote.text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
quote.author: Booker T. Washington

micro_action.task: Give a teammate a high-five and a 'good job'.

quote.text: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack of will.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Practice your hardest skill for 10 minutes.

quote.text: You may have to fight a battle more than once to win it.
quote.author: Margaret Thatcher

micro_action.task: Re-try a task you didn't finish yesterday.

quote.text: Success is most often achieved by those who don't know that failure is inevitable.
quote.author: Coco Chanel

micro_action.task: Eat a healthy piece of fruit with your dinner.

quote.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quote.author: Mark Twain

micro_action.task: Begin your training or homework 5 minutes earlier than usual.

quote.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quote.author: William James

micro_action.task: Pick up one piece of litter today.

quote.text: Whatever you are, be a good one.
quote.author: Abraham Lincoln

micro_action.task: Say 'Thank you' to a parent or guardian.

quote.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are. Know that there is something inside you that is greater than any obstacle.
quote.author: Christian D. Larson

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
quote.author: Aristotle (attributed)

micro_action.task: Organize your sports gear for tomorrow morning.

quote.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quote.author: Nelson Mandela

micro_action.task: Finish a project or task that is 90% complete.

quote.text: Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
quote.author: Robert Louis Stevenson

micro_action.task: Do something kind for a sibling or friend.

quote.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quote.author: Arthur Ashe

micro_action.task: Try a training exercise with whatever equipment you have available.

quote.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
quote.author: Walt Whitman

micro_action.task: Find one positive thing in a difficult situation today.

quote.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
quote.author: Peter Drucker

micro_action.task: Write down one goal for next month.

quote.text: Life is 10% what happens to me and 90% of how I react to it.
quote.author: Charles Swindoll

micro_action.task: Practice reacting calmly if something goes wrong today.

quote.text: It's not what you look at that matters, it's what you see.
quote.author: Henry David Thoreau

micro_action.task: Eat a serving of mixed fruit today.

quote.text: Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
quote.author: Peter Marshall

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before you go to bed.

quote.text: The difference between try and triumph is just a little umph!
quote.author: Marvin Phillips

micro_action.task: Celebrate 6 months of daily training for your mind!
